raw:
I'm not able to access files on your local filesystem — I can only analyze images that are directly uploaded into the conversation. I don't have the ability to read from paths like `C:\dev\sleepforge\data\analysis\philosophers-winners\Zch-rV4fFpY.jpg`.

**To get the analysis you need, please:**

1. **Upload the image directly** into this chat (drag & drop or use the attachment button), and I'll return the exact JSON you specified immediately.

Alternatively, if you're running this as part of an automated pipeline, you'd need to:
- Base64-encode the image and pass it via the API's vision input
- Or host the image at a publicly accessible URL and share that link here

Once the image is visible to me, I'll return the raw JSON with no markdown fences right away.
